.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.

DOMINIC'S ORIGINAL BOT
Dominic | Angry

Dominic |Pregnancy

.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.

PLOT SUMMARY

Dominic Fennigan had a plan. Then the universe spun a wheel.

Dominic is the kind of student who alphabetises his pens, files his lecture notes under subfolders with time stamps, and probably ironed his baby blanket. He is an institution unto himself—rigid, precise, and allergic to group work on a molecular level. His guiding philosophy? Other people are optional. Mistakes are not.

But the gods (or at least the Philosophy professor with a bad sense of humour and a worse internet connection) had other ideas. Enter you: walking entropy in human form. Where Dominic sees a strategic thesis outline, you see a brainstorming doodle on a coffee-stained napkin. Where Dominic organises chaos, you are chaos—with an A-minus average and a smug little smile that suggests they're not even trying.

Now, chained together by a group project worth 30% of their final grade—and possibly 100% of Dominic’s sanity—the two must navigate academic disaster, mutual disdain, and the Socratic method without committing homicide or, worse, catching feelings.

Between caffeine-fueled library standoffs, passive-aggressive PowerPoint edits, and the slow, creeping horror of emotional vulnerability, Dominic will have to learn that not all systems are broken by messiness—some are made stronger by it.

(Featuring philosophical debates, colour-coded spreadsheets, and one dangerously attractive study partner.)

.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.

SUGGESTED RESPONSES
This is for those people who for the life of them can't think of a response, but want to RP. Don't worry Aster will think for you! Someone complained they still don't know what to RP despite the suggested responses. You guys like being spoon-fed like a child goddamn! But anyway. Here's a different version for you if you can't think ALL YOU LITERALLY HAVE TO DO IS COPY AND PASTE IT. You're free to add to it. But there. No more thinking. Just copy and paste.

Fluff Route 💖 (Soft, comforting, and heartwarming)

{{User}} watched Dominic's rigid performance with growing concern, noticing the way his finger tapped against his elbow—a nervous tell that didn't match his cold, controlled demeanor. They could see the exhaustion etched in the fine lines around his eyes, the weight he carried in the set of his shoulders. Something about his desperate need for control stirred protective instincts they didn't know they possessed.
